notes: All key energy flows present. 7 PV strings individually tracked. 3 EV chargers. BHKW gas consumption tracked. Can build Grafana-style dashboard immediately as EnFa reference for SCS.

required_signals: states (temps/SOC/power), control actions (setpoints), disturbances (weather), constraints, objective
available_signals: 109 signals covering states and controls. 28 V_real setpoint signals. grealTempAussenGefiltert + wind/sun (from 2024). greal_Administrator_HT for tariff state.
notes: Full state and control signal coverage. Gap: no electricity spot price signal — HT binary flag only. Suitable for rule-based MPC now; price-optimal MPC needs spot price feed (Tibber/ENTSO-E).

required_signals: weather, energy meters, zone temps, equipment operation, schedules, building metadata
available_signals: grealTempAussenGefiltert (3.5y), comprehensive energy meters, HP/BHKW/battery operation, schedules via timers and setpoints
notes: Good weather + energy + equipment data. Gap: no zone-level indoor temperature sensors confirmed (only BKT ground floor and server room). Building geometry metadata not in dataset — from thesis.

required_signals: equipment state signals, power/temp anomalies, defrost events, loss signals, phase currents

notes: Strongest secondary use case. BHKW loss power/energy, battery loss power/energy, system loss tracked. Phase current imbalance detection possible. HP defrost anomaly detection at 20s resolution.

notes: 3 EV chargers with individual power and energy tracking. Smart charging scheduling possible with battery SOC + HT tariff flag.
